name: construction contractors managing 5-10 projects/week tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects/week, inefficient reporting causes delays in project updates. We automate daily job completion summaries instead of manual reporting via email or spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient reporting of job completion summaries to project managers.
features: manual entry for job completion details

must_have_features: manual entry for job completion details
